sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bit_shift (id UInt64, value UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, value, bitShiftLeft(value, 1) AS shifted_value FROM test_bit_shift;
UPDATE test_bit_shift SET value = bitShiftLeft(value, 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, bin(value) AS binary_value, bitShiftLeft(value, 3) AS shifted_binary FROM test_bit_shift;
